caption: A white, neoclassical cathedral with multiple domes and towers stands adjacent to a modern glass-and-concrete high-rise building. A palm tree and several other smaller trees flank the cathedral's entrance. In the background, a white car is parked or idling on the street. A few pedestrians are visible near the entrance of the cathedral, though they remain small in the frame. A traffic light is positioned on a pole in front of the building, displaying a red light. A street sign reading "MARKET" is visible on the pole. Across the sequence, the camera remains stationary, and there is very little movement within the scene; the pedestrians shift slightly, and the lighting remains consistent under a cloudy sky. The overall composition captures a contrast between traditional religious architecture and contemporary urban development.
